CHAT NOTES

Anita Sanchez   
Wombs of peace connects hearts all over the world, seen and unseen.  As Indigenous woman, Nahua Aztec and Toltec and to cocreate coherence- we do not accept separation and stand for gift of forgiving the unforgivable, gift of healing, gift of unity and gift of hope in action, the Eagle Hoop Prophecy.  Also an important time of many prophecies where the women, the grandmothers will lead.    Gratitude to Pachamama the sacred presence of the earth, the sky, the universe and all time.

Marianne Wyne  
Eliza \- thank you for sharing the description of The Anthropocene Feminine. I resonate deeply with  her. Your sharing prompted a deep exploration that culminated in a Foundations Philosophy of mine. Thank you, thank you for this gorgeous gift. So grateful.

Marianne Wyne  
We heal and rebalance Gaia by embodying the Anthropocene Feminine, restoring right sequence in how we lead, design, and govern. Like the empty bowl, we begin with disciplined receptivity, allowing coherence to form before we act, so that regeneration arises from alignment rather than force.

Patricia Neal  
At sea level in Minneapolis, at the headwaters of the Mississippi, in the land of lakes and water, home to 11 tribes and 60+ languages spoken in our schools, in the face of 90 days of brutal occupation which is still happening every day- we begin month 4 today- the reason we are still standing and even thriving, is the embedded intergenerational feminine leadership that  spontaneously emerged, and was embraced and supported by the men and others in our lives. The  creative arts are also deeply embedded. We see daily the creative expression of interconnectedness, tending and befriending, caring for the whole, expressions of new awarenesses of what it means to be truly interconnected. 

This is the new reality that will not be squandered or forgotten.

Nina \- we must clean our trauma to cherish earth in a manner she deserves…if we infect with all our old desires and difficulties  brings complexities to the water..purity of water…is as a Blessing allowing the flow of new earth rising….

Susanna \- A gentle invitation: place the water from this circle on your altar until solstice to pour into a local stream, otherwise mindfully into a plant or animal being to nurture life. A practice I will be in is to call in ancestors to bring me messages I need to hear to guide me on my path \<3
